Art is by @catjamn.

Sorry this bot is a bit late, despite playing the first 2 chapters, I can't afford the rest. I practically had nothing to go off of as well with her, hopefully this doesn't happen again. Also I swear to God if I see a bunch of rotoscoped Asgores in this review section...ok maybe just this ONCE.
